text: TDD: Write tests before implementing new features
description:
Adopt test-driven development:
1. Write failing test for desired behavior
2. Implement minimal code to pass
3. Refactor while keeping tests green

Focus on:
- New API endpoints (tRPC routers)
- Value calculation changes
- Navigation logic changes
- Economic system integration

Current coverage is minimal for business logic, TDD will improve quality

status.comment: Implemented TDD for the reflection pattern feature. Created comprehensive tests for the addReflection tRPC endpoint in src/routers/aim-reflection.test.ts. Tests verify: (1) Adding single reflections, (2) Adding multiple reflections to same aim, (3) Reflections field initialization on aim creation, (4) Reflection persistence across multiple reads. All 4 new tests pass. Total backend test suite: 23 tests, all passing. This establishes the TDD pattern for future tRPC router additions.
